title: Maruta 2: Laboratory of the Devil
original_title: 黑太陽731續集之殺人工廠
overview: In 1935, Japan's Unit 731 conducts inhumane experiments. A doctor tries to free prisoners, including his fiancée, from the camp while witnessing atrocities.
